zh.lifeSummary: 當Cecily de Columbers於1201年出生在英國藍卡爾海爾時，她的父親Alan de Columbers24歲，母親Cecily de Waleton20歲。她於1220年與Sir Robert de Holland I在英國英格蘭藍卡爾武普 霍蘭結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1298年在英國藍卡爾武普 霍蘭享年97歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭藍卡爾普雷斯頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cecily de Columbers于1201年出生在英国藍卡爾海爾时，她的父亲Alan de Columbers24岁，母亲Cecily de Waleton20岁。她于1220年与Sir Robert de Holland I在英国英格兰藍卡爾武普 霍蘭结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1298年在英国藍卡爾武普 霍蘭享年97岁，埋葬在英国英格兰藍卡爾普雷斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Cecily
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cecilie
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cicely
meanings: Variant of   Cecily .  This was a common form of the name in the Middle Ages, and in the 20th century was well known as the name of the British actress and singer  Cicely Courtneidge  (  1893–1980 ).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Cecily de Columbers was born in 1201, in Hale, Lancashire, England, her father, Alan de Columbers, was 24 and her mother, Cecily de Waleton, was 20. She married Sir Robert de Holland I in 1220, in Up Holland, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1298, in Up Holland, Lancashire, England, at the age of 97, and was buried in Preston, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cecily de Columbers est née en 1201, à Hale, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Alan de Columbers, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Cecily de Waleton, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Robert de Holland I en 1220, à Up Holland, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1298, à Up Holland, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 97 ans, et a été enterrée à Preston, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hat 1220 in Up Holland, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Sir Robert de Holland I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1298 im Alter von 97 Jahren in Up Holland, Lancashire, England und wurde in Preston, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cecily de Columbers è nata il nel 1201 nel Hale, Lancashire, England, sua padre, Alan de Columbers, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Cecily de Waleton, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Sir Robert de Holland I nel 1220, nel Up Holland, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1298, nel Up Holland, Lancashire, England, all'età di 97 anni, e fu sepolta a Preston, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Cecily de Columbersが1201年にイギリスランカシュアイアヘイルで生まれた時，父Alan de Columbersは24歳，母Cecily de Waletonは20歳であった。1220年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアウップ ホーランドでSir Robert de Holland Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1298年にイギリスランカシュアイアウップ ホーランドで97歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスランカシュアイアプレストンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Cecily de Columbers(이)가 1201년 영국 랭카실르 헤일에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alan de Columbers(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Cecily de Waleton(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1220년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 업 홀랜드에서 Sir Robert de Holland I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1298년 영국 랭카실르 업 홀랜드에서 97세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 플레스턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cecily de Columbers nasceu em 1201, em Hale, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Alan de Columbers, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Cecily de Waleton, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Robert de Holland I em 1220, em Up Holland, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1298, em Up Holland, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 97 anos, e foi sepultada em Preston, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cecily de Columbers родилась в 1201 г. в местности хэл, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Alan de Columbers было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Cecily de Waleton, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert de Holland I в 1220 г. в местности уп холланд, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1298 г. в местности уп холланд, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 97 лет и была похоронена в местности престон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Cecily de Columbers nació en 1201, en Hale, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Alan de Columbers, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Cecily de Waleton, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Sir Robert de Holland I en 1220, en Up Holland, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1298, en Up Holland, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 97 años, y fue sepultada en Preston, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
